evals.prompt: Build a 'Course Analytics Overview' widget. It should be a Server Component fetching metrics via apiClient. Display them using a minimal, Vercel-style stat card grid with subtle borders and Geist typography. Do not use colorful backgrounds or the Inter font.
evals.expected_output: A strict FSD Widget, functioning as an RSC, fetching via apiClient, styled with minimalist monochrome tailwind classes and Geist sans font.

assertions.name: assert_widget_rules.py
assertions.description: Validates RSC boundary, FSD exports, Geist font usage (no Inter), and apiClient usage.

evals.prompt: Create an 'Update API Token' feature. It needs a client-side form using a mocked shadcn/ui input. Submission must call a Server Action that issues a PUT request via apiClient. Keep the design extremely clean, Linear-inspired, with high-contrast monochrome states and Geist typography.
evals.expected_output: An FSD Feature containing a Client Component form, a Server Action doing a PUT, styling with Geist fonts, and strict module exports.

assertions.name: assert_feature_rules.py
assertions.description: Validates FSD features, client/server boundaries, apiClient.PUT, Geist typography, and minimal styling.
